detail.description:
Looking for a cozy word search puzzle adventure? Find hidden words, beat the clock, and give charming hotels a complete makeover!

Join the dedicated hotel manager Mr. Bellweather and his cat Peaches as you bring run-down places back to life. Behind dusty lobbies and quiet hallways, the character they once had still lingers. Mr. Bellweather believes they deserve a second chance and needs your keen eye to help them shine again.

BRAIN-TEASING WORD PUZZLES
• Beat the Clock: Enjoy a thrilling take
